## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Be specific about behavior, API surface, or configuration.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the feature request.
